overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic urban environment from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a sunlit glass-walled observation lounge, transitioning through a dark neon-lit indoor market with various vendor stalls, and exiting to a bright exterior plaza with dust effects and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit observation lounge with glass curtain walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a modern sunlit lounge with red and white plastic chairs, approaching the glass walls overlooking the city

entered.detail: bright red plastic chairs arranged around white tables on the right side
white plastic chairs paired with tables in the center area
floor-to-ceiling glass walls providing panoramic views of the futuristic city skyline
large potted tree in a white rectangular planter on the left side
contemporary black lounge sofa along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright, sunlit interior lounge with modern furniture including red and white plastic chairs and a black sofa. Large glass curtain walls reveal a futuristic city skyline outside. The space is empty of people, with warm afternoon sunlight streaming through the windows as the camera walks forward across the tiled floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food court with neon lighting and vendor stalls

events.description: passes through plastic strip curtains entering the dark covered market from the bright sunlit lounge
lighting shifts dramatically from natural sunlight to artificial neon and fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: entering a dark covered market area, passing through plastic strip curtains and approaching food vendor counters

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt standing at a food counter ordering food
person sitting at a plastic table near the food stall

entered.detail: translucent plastic strip curtains marking the entrance to the covered market area
illuminated food service counter with menu displays and serving area
pink neon light strips running along the ceiling and walls
large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overhead structure
teal-colored industrial walls covered in graffiti and street art

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the bright lounge into a dark, covered market through plastic strip curtains. The lighting shifts to artificial neon pink strips and fluorescent lights. The environment features concrete pillars, graffiti-covered teal walls, and food stall counters. Sparse crowds include a person ordering at a counter and another sitting at a table.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit cyberware market with various vendor stalls and vending machines

events.description: passing by a prominent cyberware vendor stall with bright teal signage and glowing displays

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowded market interior, passing various vendor stalls including a cyberware shop and burger stand, while avoiding pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket walking past the camera toward the interior
vendor standing behind the cyberware counter attending to the stall

entered.detail: teal-colored vendor stall with bright 'CYBERWARE' neon signage and digital displays
food stall with red 'BURGER' neon signage and illuminated menu boards
tall purple automated vending machine with glowing product displays
bright neon sign indicating open status for a vendor stall
hanging digital screens displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the covered market, the scene features dense commercial activity with a prominent cyberware vendor stall on the left and a burger stand on the right. The floor is littered with trash and debris. Neon signs in pink, teal, and red illuminate the space. Moderate crowds walk through the narrow corridor, including a person in a yellow jacket passing by and vendors attending their stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior plaza with overhead canopy, water features, and dust effects

events.description: exits the dark covered market into a bright sunlit exterior plaza with palm trees
bright afternoon sunlight floods the scene creating strong lens flare and illuminating dust particles in the air

agents.ego_description: walking out of the covered market into a bright exterior plaza, passing pedestrians and approaching the open city view

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead toward the plaza exit with the city skyline in background

entered.detail: open-air plaza space with concrete flooring transitioning from the indoor market
large planters containing palm trees lining the plaza walkway
reflective water pool or fountain feature on the left side of the walkway
atmospheric dust and smoke effects visible in the sunlight near the tall buildings
large concrete overhead structure providing partial cover over the plaza walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the dark market into a bright, sunlit exterior plaza with an overhead concrete canopy. The scene features palm tree planters, a water feature on the left, and atmospheric dust effects illuminated by the afternoon sun. The lighting transitions from neon artificial to warm natural sunlight. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead toward the city skyline visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sterile, sunlit observation lounge through a gritty neon-lit market and finally into a bright outdoor plaza. It begins by gliding across a tiled floor past modern red and white furniture, with warm afternoon light streaming through glass walls that overlook a futuristic skyline. As the camera passes through plastic strip curtains, the environment shifts abruptly from natural brightness to a dark, covered market illuminated by pink neon strips and fluorescent lights against graffiti-covered teal walls. The scene then deepens into a narrow, debris-strewn corridor crowded with cyberware vendors and burger stands before the camera pushes forward toward an exit. Finally, the lighting transitions from artificial neon back to warm natural sunlight as the camera emerges into an exterior plaza featuring palm trees, water features, and atmospheric dust drifting under a concrete canopy.
